description: T173 QueryExecutionEngine gate order MANDATORY: T187 QuotaManager (INLINE, layer 1) → F422 RLS (layer 2) → F423 PII masking (layer 3). Reordering is BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: F422 RLS applied before T187 quota check
F423 PII masking applied before F422 RLS
executeQuery called before any gate completes
T187 quota check omitted
quotaManager.recordUsage() called before query completes
passConditions: T187.check() runs at layer 1 before any warehouse access
F422.apply() runs at layer 2 before query execution
F423.mask() runs at layer 3 on results before serialization
resolution: T173 execute(): quota.check() at layer 1, rls.apply() at layer 2, piiMask.mask() at layer 3 BEFORE executeQuery. Any reordering = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T187 QuotaManager is INLINE — F426 does NOT exist. T187 must be instantiated directly in T173 constructor. Never @Inject(). Never reference F426.
blockConditions: T187 resolved via @Inject() token
F426 factory reference appears anywhere in codebase
QuotaManager registered as NestJS provider
quotaManager resolved via factory or DI container
passConditions: T173 constructor contains: this.quotaManager = new QuotaManager(...)
No @Inject or factory token used for T187
resolution: T173 constructor: this.quotaManager = new QuotaManager(config). @Inject(T187) or @Inject('F426') = BUILD_FAILURE. F426 does not exist.

description: T186 DataRetentionEnforcer 4-step order MANDATORY AND INVIOLABLE: 1=legal hold check → 2=approval token → 3=governance → 4=purge+emit. Legal hold active → return immediately.
blockConditions: purge executed before legal hold check
approval token validation skipped
governance check skipped
DataPurged event contains rawContent, content, payload, body, or data field
legal hold check bypassed via tenant flag
passConditions: ILegalHoldService.check() at step 1 — active hold returns ContentRetentionExtended immediately
IApprovalService.validate() at step 2 — missing/expired token returns failure
IDataGovernanceService.enforceRetention() at step 3
DataPurged emitted with tombstoneRef ONLY at step 4
resolution: T186: legalHold.check() at step 1. If active hold → emit ContentRetentionExtended, return. approval.validate() at step 2. governance.enforceRetention() at step 3. purge+emit DataPurged(tombstoneRef ONLY) at step 4. Any reordering = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: PLATFORM-ONLY factories (F411 export encryption, F412 export audit, F422 RLS, F423 PII masking, F424 governance, F425 warehouse audit) CANNOT be disabled by tenants. No bypass or tenant override permitted.
blockConditions: skipEncryption flag accepted from tenant config
skipMasking flag accepted from tenant config
canBeDisabled:true on any PLATFORM-ONLY factory
tenant override path exists for F411, F412, F422, F423, F424, or F425
passConditions: All PLATFORM-ONLY factories have canBeDisabled:false in registry
No tenant configuration field bypasses any PLATFORM-ONLY factory
resolution: All PLATFORM-ONLY factories have canBeDisabled: false in registry. No skipEncryption, skipMasking, or bypass flag accepted. Any tenant override path = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: All cross-flow data joins must include tenantId predicate. T180 CrossFlowCorrelationEngine must have tenantId in EVERY predicate across ALL source flows.
blockConditions: searchDocuments call missing tenantId in predicate
cross-flow join predicate does not include tenantId
sourceFlows.length < 2 in correlation engine
tenantId sourced from event payload instead of ALS
passConditions: Every searchDocuments call includes { tenantId: context.tenantId }
All cross-flow join predicates include tenantId
tenantId sourced exclusively from AsyncLocalStorage
resolution: T180 builds every join predicate with { tenantId: context.tenantId, ...otherFilters }. sourceFlows.length >= 2. Missing tenantId on any join = CF-FLOW13-AN-1 violation.

description: T181 DataExportEngine downloadUrl in DataExportReady event MUST have expiresAt field. Non-expiring download URLs are a security violation.
blockConditions: DataExportReady event emitted without expiresAt field
downloadUrl created as permanent link
expiresAt set to null or not present in export event payload
passConditions: DataExportReady event includes expiresAt as ISO date-time string
downloadUrl is time-limited — expires within the configured window
resolution: DataExportReady event contains expiresAt (date-time). downloadUrl without expiresAt = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T186 DataPurged event MUST contain tombstoneRef ONLY. PROHIBITED: rawContent, content, payload, body, data. Including raw content in purge events violates data protection.
blockConditions: DataPurged event contains rawContent field
DataPurged event contains content field
DataPurged event contains payload field
DataPurged event contains body or data field with entity content
passConditions: DataPurged event contains only: tombstoneRef, tenantId, contentId, purgedAt, policyId
No entity data transmitted in DataPurged event
resolution: DataPurged contains tombstoneRef, tenantId, contentId, purgedAt, policyId ONLY. Any rawContent/content/payload/body/data field = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T174 MetricAggregationEngine must store aggregated metric records to xiigen-warehouse-metrics with tenantId scoped from ALS. Metric aggregation without tenant scope leaks cross-tenant data into warehouse analytics.
blockConditions: metric record stored without tenantId field
tenantId sourced from MetricAggregationRequested event payload
xiigen-warehouse-metrics index written without knowledgeScope:PRIVATE
passConditions: metric record includes tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
storeDocument called with PRIVATE scope for xiigen-warehouse-metrics
resolution: T174 reads tenantId from cls.get().tenantId only. All storeDocument calls include tenantId. knowledgeScope:PRIVATE on all metric records.

description: T175 KPIDashboardGenerator must generate KPI snapshots idempotently — a snapshot for (tenantId, dashboardId, snapshotAt) must not be duplicated. Duplicate snapshots corrupt dashboard trend lines.
blockConditions: KPI snapshot stored without snapshotId (tenantId+dashboardId+snapshotAt hash)
duplicate snapshot allowed for same tenantId+dashboardId+snapshotAt combination
storeDocument used without idempotency key check
passConditions: snapshotId = hash(tenantId+':'+dashboardId+':'+snapshotAt) computed server-side
SETNX or storeDocumentWithOCC used to prevent duplicate snapshots
resolution: T175 derives snapshotId server-side and checks for existing record before writing. Duplicate snapshot for same (tenantId, dashboardId, snapshotAt) = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T177 FunnelAnalysisEngine must process funnel steps in declared sequence order. Out-of-order step processing produces incorrect drop-off rates — a user counted as completing step 3 without step 2 inflates conversion artificially.
blockConditions: funnel steps processed without sortBy(stepOrder) before aggregation
drop-off calculated without verifying preceding step completion
funnel result stored without stepSequence field validating order
passConditions: funnelSteps sorted by stepOrder before processing
drop-off rate computed as: (step[n-1].completions - step[n].completions) / step[n-1].completions
funnel record includes stepSequence array in declared order
resolution: T177 sorts steps by stepOrder, validates sequence completeness before drop-off calculation. Unordered funnel processing = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T178 RetentionCohortAnalyzer must use FREEDOM-configurable time windows (day-1, day-7, day-30) for cohort analysis. Hardcoded time windows prevent tenant-specific retention analysis customisation.
blockConditions: retention time windows hardcoded as const D1=1, D7=7, D30=30
cohort analysis uses fixed window regardless of FREEDOM config value
retentionWindows field absent from stored cohort record
passConditions: time window values read from FREEDOM config at runtime
retentionWindows array stored with cohort record for audit trail
resolution: T178 reads flow13_retention_windows from FREEDOM config. Hardcoded time windows = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T179 ReportScheduler must deduplicate schedule registrations using scheduleId = hash(tenantId+reportType+cronExpression). Duplicate schedule registrations cause multiple report deliveries for the same subscription.
blockConditions: schedule registered without scheduleId uniqueness check
duplicate schedule allowed for same (tenantId, reportType, cronExpression)
scheduleId sourced from request payload instead of server-derived hash
passConditions: scheduleId = hash(tenantId+':'+reportType+':'+cronExpression) computed server-side
SETNX or equivalent uniqueness check before storing schedule
resolution: T179 derives scheduleId server-side and rejects duplicate (tenantId, reportType, cronExpression) combinations. Client-supplied scheduleId = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T183 AlertingRulesEngine must read alert thresholds from alert rule documents stored in xiigen-warehouse-alert-rules — never hardcode threshold values. Hardcoded thresholds require code deployment to update alerting sensitivity.
blockConditions: alert threshold hardcoded as const in T183 source
threshold value not read from alert rule document
alert rule document not fetched before threshold comparison
passConditions: alert rule document fetched by (tenantId, ruleId) before threshold evaluation
threshold value read from alertRuleDocument.threshold field
resolution: T183 fetches alert rule document, reads threshold from stored rule. Hardcoded threshold = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T184 QueryOptimizationAdvisor is READ-ONLY. It must NOT execute queries, trigger query execution, or write to any warehouse index. Advisor that executes queries bypasses the three-layer gate order enforced by T173.
blockConditions: T184 calls db.storeDocument on any warehouse index
T184 triggers query execution directly or indirectly
T184 calls any write-path method on QueryExecutionEngine
passConditions: T184 only calls db.searchDocuments and db.getDocument
T184 returns optimization suggestions without executing them
No storeDocument, deleteDocument, or enqueue in T184
resolution: T184 reads query history and index statistics via searchDocuments only. Any write or execution call in T184 = ARCHITECTURE_VIOLATION.

description: T185 DataLineageTracker must only append new lineage records — NEVER update or delete existing ones. Lineage is an immutable audit trail. Updating lineage records destroys compliance evidence of data provenance.
blockConditions: existing lineage record updated via storeDocumentWithOCC
lineage record deleted via deleteDocument
lineage record mutated to reflect data correction
passConditions: T185 calls storeDocument with a new lineageId for each DataTransformed event
lineageId includes timestamp component making each entry unique
No update or delete operation on xiigen-warehouse-lineage index
resolution: T185 creates a new lineage record per event. Never updates existing records. Any mutation of existing lineage = COMPLIANCE_VIOLATION.

description: T188 WarehouseHealthMonitor is READ-ONLY for health checks — it MUST NOT trigger query execution, schema changes, or data mutations. A health monitor that mutates data is indistinguishable from a data operation and violates separation of concerns.
blockConditions: T188 calls storeDocument on any warehouse data index
T188 triggers T173 QueryExecutionEngine directly
T188 modifies schema or configuration as part of health check
passConditions: T188 reads health metrics via searchDocuments on xiigen-warehouse-health index
T188 stores health check results only to xiigen-warehouse-health (its own private index)
T188 does not call any write-path service other than its own index
resolution: T188 only reads warehouse health metrics and stores health check results to its own index. Any warehouse data mutation from T188 = ARCHITECTURE_VIOLATION.

blockConditions: warehouse query record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored query record

resolution: scope_isolation: { modelToken: 'AI_SCOPE_ARBITER', blind: true, blockSemanticsBehavior: 'ANY_BLOCK_CLASS_REJECTS' }
